scripts.clean: npm run clean:core && npm run clean:agent
scripts.clean:agent: cd agents/wallet && (test -d dist && rm -rf dist || true) && (test -d node_modules/@ton-ai && rm -rf node_modules/@ton-ai || true)
scripts.build:core: cd packages/core && npm install && npm run build && npm pack
scripts.copy-packages: mkdir -p agents/wallet/node_modules/@ton-ai && cp packages/core/ton-ai-core-0.1.0.tgz agents/wallet/node_modules/@ton-ai/ 2>/dev/null || echo 'Core package copy skipped'
scripts.rebuild: npm run clean && npm run build:core && npm run build:agent && npm run copy-packages
scripts.rebuild:quick: npm run build:core && npm run copy-packages && cd agents/wallet && npm install
scripts.dev: npm run rebuild && npm run start:agent
